global.description: An ad for the brand that features a solid background covering the full canvas, providing a clean and minimalistic foundation for the other elements. The ad prominently displays the 'VantaStyle' logo multiple times, with one instance located at the top left corner in a pink rounded rectangle with bold black text. In the upper middle section, a decorative pink zigzag pattern spans horizontally, adding a dynamic and playful touch to the composition. This pattern consists of alternating light and dark pink triangles forming a zigzag line. Additionally, there are pink rounded rectangles with darker pink diagonal lines positioned slightly to the left in the upper middle section, enhancing the visual interest with their geometric shapes. A small pink circle with a darker pink outline is positioned towards the middle left, adding a subtle decorative element against the pink background. Centrally located is the headline, featuring white text on a pink background that reads 'New collection drop' in larger font, with 'Shop bestsellers now' in smaller font below, capturing the viewer's attention with its bold message. At the bottom, we see a white rounded rectangle with black text that reads 'Watch now', serving as a call-to-action button near the bottom center of the ad. Adjacent to this, a pink rectangle with rounded corners contains the text '€9.99' in yellow, positioned near the bottom left, indicating a price tag. A yellow rectangle with the word 'SALE' in bold black letters is located in the top right area, highlighting a promotional offer. Lastly, a small white rounded rectangle with the black text 'UGC' is near the top left corner, possibly indicating user-generated content.
global.main_message: Discover the new collection and shop bestsellers now.

embedding_texts.global_text: The ad for VantaStyle features a solid pink background with multiple decorative elements, including a zigzag pattern, rounded rectangles, and a circle. The headline promotes a new collection drop, and a call-to-action button invites viewers to watch now. A price tag and sale badge highlight promotional offers.
